name: defparam_in_generate_block
description: Code should include a defparam statement inside a generate block that overrides a parameter on a module instantiated within the same generate block. The defparam uses hierarchical path notation (instance_name.parameter_name) to reference the parameter.

name: generate_block_module_instantiation
description: Code should include a module instantiated inside a generate block using a local instance name, where the instantiation uses named port connections and the instance is referenced by a defparam in the same generate block scope.
